discovery.description: Call discover_tools to browse 327 tools by category or task instead of loading all schemas into context.

examples.result: top matching tools ranked by relevance

categories.name: weather
categories.examples: current weather, forecast, alerts, air quality

categories.name: finance
categories.providers: Finnhub, FRED, FDIC, ECB, RateAPI, IBAN
categories.examples: stock quotes, FX rates, economic data, mortgage rates

categories.name: search
categories.examples: web search, news search, semantic search

categories.name: news
categories.examples: latest news, global events, crypto news

categories.name: location
categories.providers: Geoapify, Geocodio, Foursquare, Walk Score, Realtor, Open Charge Map

categories.name: health
categories.providers: USDA, OpenFDA, WHO, FatSecret, Spoonacular, ClinicalTrials, PubChem
categories.examples: nutrition, drug safety, clinical trials, recipes

categories.name: entertainment
categories.providers: TMDB, Ticketmaster, RAWG, IGDB, Jikan, MusicBrainz, PodcastIndex, API-Sports
categories.examples: movies, events, games, anime, music, podcasts, sports

categories.name: education
categories.providers: OpenAlex, arXiv, PubMed, Open Library, College Scorecard

categories.name: business
categories.examples: LEI lookup, UK companies, email enrichment

categories.name: developer
categories.providers: QRServer, WhoisXML, TimeAPI, NHTSA, Langbly, ConvertAPI, API2PDF, IPQualityScore
categories.examples: QR codes, WHOIS, VIN decode, translation, PDF generation

categories.name: media
categories.providers: Pexels, Stability AI, OCR.space, ARTIC, Europeana, AssemblyAI
categories.examples: stock photos, image generation, OCR, art, transcription

categories.name: world
